# Generated rubric — binding

> **Generated publication.** The TypeScript rubric items under `scripts/rubric/items/` are canonical; this file is generated from the in-memory catalogue. Edit the item definitions, then rerun `scripts/rubric/publish.ts`.

## BIND — Cross-surface agreement

→ [standard](standards.md)

Agreement between the source and enabled run surfaces.

- **BIND-1 [M] — file-editable surfaces agree with the source** — Every rendered surface contains exactly the KI-governed servers that target it. (standards.md)
- **BIND-2 [M] — single MCP source is valid** — The source exists, parses, and names supported surfaces. (standards.md)
- **BIND-3 [M] — project-local skill links are wired** — A requested project passes the ki-bootstrap link check. (standards.md)
- **BIND-4 [M] — Cowork plugin integrity** — Cowork settings register and enable the KI plugin. (standards.md)
- **BIND-5 [J] — client targeting is right for project use** — The clients set reflects intended surface use. (standards.md)
  - _Review prompt:_ Does each server target the surfaces the project needs, without carrying surfaces it should not?
